productDisplayName: Puma Men Vibrant VI Black Sports Shoes
description: The Vibrant VI range of shoes from puma are meant for a variety of indoor Sports and training. Made of superior quality material and with a non-marking sole, these shoes look stylish and perform well.UpperSynthetic upper for durable protectionFormstripe and cat logo on the sides for added style and comfortAppliquéd cat logo on the tongue to create a fashion statementCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMesh tongue for breathabilityMidsoleEcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort and supportRemovable sole insertOrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offIdCELL technology to improve shock absorption and protect the feetEverTrack used in the outsole for enhanced durability in high-wear areasNon marking sole in multi-directional pattern for superior grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
